title: J&K L-G Orders Magisterial Inquiry into Ganderbal Killing Amid Allegations of Fake Encounter
description: The incident occurred late on Tuesday night in the Arhama area of Ganderbal and immediately triggered public outrage. Family members and locals identified the deceased as 28-year-old Raashid Ahmad Mughal of Lar, Ganderbal, asserting that Mughal was an unarmed civilian
